tasks.procedure: Derive the exact M23.7.1 through M23.7.6 evidence identities and candidate/Source identities from repository evidence.
Inspect the accepted read-only production snapshot and record whether refresh is required before any later promotion.
Validate the immutable non-production Qdrant point, vector, manifest and authority identities without contacting Qdrant.
Execute the deterministic offline retrieval evaluator and record quality, ACL, stale-source and prompt-injection metrics.
Execute the frozen lexical-authoritative shadow replay and record candidate quality, latency and output-influence evidence.
Execute candidate-only grounded composition and record grounding, citation, abstention, cost and authority evidence.
Select the frozen Qdrant-unavailable scenario, state the bounded failure class and verify lexical output continuity.
Verify immediate lexical-only rollback and enumerate candidate dependencies that are not required.
Verify Graph Explorer deployment posture, authentication, read-only state, default flag and public exposure boundary.
Carry all unresolved blockers forward, state qualification separately from promotion eligibility, and emit deterministic canonical JSON.
